title: House 3 Skeleton Lawn — Eva freezes Joe licks her hand
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.
Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-wide on the lawn pathway.

Scene: @ep15_house3_skeleton_lawn — front lawn with a row of friendly cartoon white plastic lawn skeletons softly placed across the grass (smiling skull faces, simple plastic, NO animatronic, NO scream sound), soft purple porch lights, gentle Halloween-night ambiance.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, medium-wide eye-level. @Sara center-left on the path, her left hand resting reassuringly on @Eva's right shoulder, candy bucket in her right hand at hip. @Eva center-right beside Sara, gripping @Joe's blue leash, pumpkin bucket on her left. @Joe standing in front of Eva's left foot, head tilted up at her.
0:2-0:4 — Slow push in to a soft medium on @Eva. @Eva freezes softly in place, mouth in a small kid-show pout, eyes worried-but-brave. @Eva, gently: "Sara... they're a lot of skeletons."
0:4-0:6 — Cut to low-angle close-up on @Joe. @Joe lifts his fluffy white face softly upward and gently licks @Eva's left hand once with a small in-place tongue motion. Tail wagging.

0:6-0:8 — Slow tilt up from @Joe to @Eva. @Eva looks down at his lick, her pout softens into a relieved smile. @Sara turns her cheerful face toward Eva. @Sara: "They're cartoon skeletons, Eva. They smile."
0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Eva, looking softly down at @Joe: "Joe is brave, so I'm brave." Lawn skeletons sit motionless in the soft purple background.

Lighting: soft purple porch glow gently washing the friendly cartoon plastic skeletons in the background.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to medium, one cut to low-angle close-up on Joe, capped by a slow tilt up and slow pull back
closingFrame: Lawn pathway medium-wide at @ep15_house3_skeleton_lawn — @Sara center-left with her left hand on @Eva's right shoulder and candy bucket in her right hand at hip; @Eva center-right with relieved smile, @Joe's leash in right hand and pumpkin bucket in left; @Joe standing in front of Eva's left foot in bug costume, fluffy face still slightly lifted toward Eva's hand; row of friendly cartoon plastic skeletons softly placed across the lawn in soft purple porch glow.
papaCheckIn: no Papa in this clip — Papa returns in clip 10 for the Papa-active beat
